title: Upon Ralph.
content:
Ralph pares his nails, his warts, his corns, and Ralph
    In sev'rall tills and boxes, keeps 'em safe;
    Instead of hartshorn, if he speaks the troth,
    To make a lusty-jelly for his broth.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Ralph.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
